name: bcs-toggle-xor-chain
description: Parent char style: bCs=on, cs=on, cs font=David. Child char style basedOn parent: bCs=on (XOR -> off).
expected_behavior: Run 1 (parent): cs+bCs=on -> Mark::Bold. Run 2 (child): bCs XOR(on,on)=off -> no Bold.
current_status: GAP-133 — bCs toggle XOR through basedOn chain
